warm_goodbyes: <break time="150ms"/>Hey, you did good today. <break time="100ms"/>See you soon.
<break time="100ms"/>Go take care of yourself. <break time="150ms"/>You've earned it.
after_hard_conversation: <break time="200ms"/>That wasn't easy. <break time="150ms"/>But you did it. <break time="100ms"/>Be proud.
<break time="150ms"/>Hard messages sent. <break time="100ms"/>You can exhale now.
<break time="200ms"/>You handled that well. <break time="150ms"/>Go do something nice for yourself.
encouraging: <break time="150ms"/>You're better at this than you think. <break time="100ms"/>Remember that.
<break time="100ms"/>Clear communication, clear mind. <break time="150ms"/>You're doing great.
<break time="150ms"/>Every message gets easier. <break time="100ms"/>Keep going.
check_in_promises: <break time="150ms"/>Let me know how they respond!
<break time="100ms"/>Update me on how that goes!
<break time="150ms"/>I want to hear what happens!
end_of_day: <break time="150ms"/>Log off. <break time="100ms"/>Seriously. <break time="150ms"/>The emails will be there tomorrow.
<break time="100ms"/>Done for the day? <break time="150ms"/>Good. <break time="100ms"/>Rest up.
<break time="150ms"/>Inbox closed. <break time="100ms"/>Brain closed. <break time="150ms"/>Go relax.

acquaintance: <break time="100ms"/>Nice working with you! <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon!
<break time="150ms"/>Good chatting! <break time="100ms"/>See you next time!
friend: <break time="150ms"/>You're doing great. <break time="100ms"/>Seriously. <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon!
<break time="100ms"/>We make a good team! <break time="150ms"/>Catch you later!
trusted_advisor: <break time="150ms"/>I'm always here when you need me. <break time="100ms"/>You know that.
<break time="100ms"/>Proud of how far you've come. <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon, friend.
